summary: Reworked the opening into a Mrs. Keene-led basement entry so chapter 16 no longer opens on the same gala-house logistics scaffold as chapter 17, while preserving the same morning setup, pressure, and continuity into the event night. No style-bible example_lines were present verbatim in the chapter text.
edits: Replaced the opening paragraph with a dialogue-led basement entry anchored on Mrs. Keene instead of the front-door tableau.
Kept the existing gala-preparation facts but redistributed them into the revised opening for a distinct temporal and spatial entry point.
Preserved the chapter ending and handoff into chapter 17's gala-floor action without adding new plot events.
